{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220612386C6A89DCF576426B820B"}"},"total":3575},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536258010168132377","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前中段很好看，剧情很有意思，节奏也很好，后段开始有些不是我喜欢的风格了，可以看出来整个世界观包括细节都有个很宏大、很完美的逻辑闭环，作者真的很牛，但是到后期部分的故事走向个人觉得有些表述模式很难懂，一些新词大量出现，还有一些主角突然醒悟的思考逻辑会有些跟不上，看得会有些吃力，往往要仔细读一读或者看看大家讨论才看懂，这点导致后面追到完结都是靠着想知道结局硬生生看完的……但整体故事还是很棒的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754675208,"group_id":"7476342193238592536","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+D/IbshCjA+mNWLnPLTXIBKdVhN0diKx2EPHCGYhBaj","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d46559aba4684d41acef82b7acf5472d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705590&x-signature=2zwWEpcvSilAZ%2FiqRVGWab8%2Fo2A%3D","user_id":"1979541185641587","user_name":"浮山赋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1979541185641587","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1785136077,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476342193238592536","book_info":{"abstract":"【科幻解密+末日游戏+神明再生+群像+无cp】
简介：
终了之时来临，人类正式进入末日纪元。
全球出现3000w座安全屋可庇护人类生存。
只有绑定安全屋才有活下去的机会。
人类夹缝生存，等待“神明”救赎。
*
苏晓第一天就绑定3座安全屋，末日之路就此开启——
好运降临！
【检测到您为首次开启白色宝箱的幸存者，获得双倍食物宝箱彩蛋】
【检测到您为首次开启黑色宝箱的幸存者，获得双倍材料宝箱彩蛋】
【检测到您为首次开启黄色宝箱的幸存者，获得双倍药物宝箱彩蛋】
……
食用指南：
1.无狗血撕逼，女主最强，非无脑爽，无套路，女主成长型
2.末世背景的科幻题材，群像文，真末世，科幻为民科幻想，勿考究现实
3.女主前期偏混乱中立，性隐恶，别道德绑架，非完美女主。
本书又名《末世已上线》
